CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.task: Consolidate 90+ config files into single heady.config.yaml
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.action: Create configs/heady.config.yaml with all kernel, app, infra, branding, MCP definitions
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.validation: Zero config duplication, single source of truth
blocking: All subsequent tasks depend on config clarity

CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.task: Decompose heady-manager.js (78KB monolith) into AIOS kernel modules
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.action: Split into: scheduler.ts, context-manager.ts, memory-manager.ts, tool-manager.ts, hook-system.ts, access-manager.ts
blocking: Cannot implement orchestration without modular kernel

CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.task: Enforce ESM-only, delete all mixed ESM/CJS syntax
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.action: Convert all require() to import, add 'type': 'module' to package.json, delete .cjs files
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.validation: Zero import errors, clean module resolution

CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.task: Delete all .ps1, .bat, .zip, .exe, deployment logs from repo root
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.action: git rm *.ps1 *.bat *.zip *.exe *.log deployment-* from root and src/
CRITICAL_PATH_TASKS.validation: Clean git status, zero cruft files

PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.task: Deploy Cloudflare Workers for HeadyOS shell
PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.action: Migrate from Render → CF Workers, setup wrangler.toml, implement dynamic routing

PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.task: Setup Webpack 5 Module Federation for all micro-frontends
PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.action: Configure HeadyBuddy, HeadyLens, HeadyIDE, HeadyMonitor as remotes with shared design system
PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.deliverable: webpack.config.js with ModuleFederationPlugin for each app
PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.validation: 70% bundle size reduction, lazy loading working

PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.task: Implement JIT component loading with React.lazy + Suspense
PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.action: Wrap all micro-frontend imports in React.lazy, add loading boundaries
PHASE_1_EDGE_INFRASTRUCTURE.deliverable: HeadyOS shell loads 12KB, sections load on scroll

PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.task: Implement Monte Carlo scheduler with 10K simulations
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.action: Build monte_carlo_scheduler.py with resource allocation logic
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.validation: Optimal node selection across 10K scenarios, 40% cost reduction

PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.task: Build custom Kubernetes HeadyOperator for morphing apps
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.action: Create CRD HeadyApp.yaml, implement controller with morph logic
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.validation: Single heady/node:latest image morphs to any role

PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.action: Build probe-orchestrator.ts with ping → functional → e2e → visual-llm → domain-sweep
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.validation: 95% reduction in undetected failures, auto-escalation to HeadyBrain

PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.task: Wire PDCA self-healing loop into HeadyBrain
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.action: Implement Plan-Do-Check-Act cycle for autonomous fix generation
PHASE_2_INTELLIGENT_ORCHESTRATION.validation: System learns from failures, proposes structural improvements

PHASE_3_DYNAMIC_CONNECTORS.task: Implement MCP Gateway with JIT tool loading
PHASE_3_DYNAMIC_CONNECTORS.action: Build jit-tool-loader.ts with intent detection + on-demand import
PHASE_3_DYNAMIC_CONNECTORS.validation: 60% context window savings, zero startup tool registration

PHASE_3_DYNAMIC_CONNECTORS.task: Build intelligent MCP router with multi-tenant support
PHASE_3_DYNAMIC_CONNECTORS.action: Create mcp-gateway/intelligent-router.ts with role-based routing + rate limiting
Build connector-watcher.ts that auto-registers new MCP servers
PHASE_3_DYNAMIC_CONNECTORS.validation: New connectors live in <5 minutes, agent broadcast working

PHASE_4_GENERATIVE_UI.action: Build generative-ui-engine.ts with sandboxed component rendering
PHASE_4_GENERATIVE_UI.validation: Generates JSX from prompts, XSS/injection safe

PHASE_4_GENERATIVE_UI.action: Create React component that safely renders LLM-generated JSX
PHASE_4_GENERATIVE_UI.validation: No DOM access, restricted APIs, crash isolation

PHASE_5_HIVE_ARCHITECTURE.action: Create Dockerfile with morphing capability via NODE_ROLE env var
PHASE_5_HIVE_ARCHITECTURE.validation: Single image, JIT installs tools per role, <500MB base

PHASE_5_HIVE_ARCHITECTURE.action: Build morph-engine.ts that downloads tools + reconfigures without restart

PHASE_5_HIVE_ARCHITECTURE.task: Create orphan-branch Git forge for deployment artifacts
PHASE_5_HIVE_ARCHITECTURE.action: Build forge script that squashes history into single compressed commit
PHASE_5_HIVE_ARCHITECTURE.validation: Deterministic builds, zero Git bloat, single-commit deploys

PHASE_6_SECURITY_HARDENING.action: Build secrets-manager.ts that fetches credentials on-demand, never in context
PHASE_6_SECURITY_HARDENING.validation: Zero secrets in LLM context, audit trail for all access

PHASE_6_SECURITY_HARDENING.task: Enforce role isolation matrix (coordinators can't edit, executors can't delegate)
PHASE_6_SECURITY_HARDENING.action: Build permission enforcer in orchestration kernel
PHASE_6_SECURITY_HARDENING.validation: Agent tool access matches role definition, violations blocked

DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS.esm_only: find . -name '*.js' -exec sed -i 's/require(/import /g' {} + && jq '.type = "module"' package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json package.json
DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS.fix_websites: cd apps && for app in headyme headyapi headyconnection; do cd $app && pnpm build && pnpm deploy && cd ..; done

SUCCESS_CRITERIA.kernel: 12 modular TypeScript files, each <500 lines, 100% coverage
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.performance: Sub-50ms TTFB globally, 70% bundle reduction, 40% cost savings
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.security: Zero secrets in LLM context, role isolation enforced
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.deployment: Single universal container, morphs in <10s, deterministic builds
SUCCESS_CRITERIA.websites: All domains show correct public content, zero admin gating
